summary: Phase 3A: Dispatch Readiness Governor (MID READY Gate). Adds COMPILED, READY, SENT to dispatch_state enum. Replaces ordinal-based forward-only trigger with explicit whitelist FSM: MINTED→COMPILED→READY→SENT→DELIVERED|FAILED|BOUNCED (QUEUED/DISPATCHED deprecated). Creates fn_mark_mid_ready(uuid) — validates COMPILED state, canonical lifecycle (QUALIFIED+, not SUPPRESSED), suppression check → transitions to READY. Creates fn_mid_suppression_check(uuid) stub (always TRUE, Phase 3B placeholder). Updates fn_canonical_monotonic_guard with new dispatch ordinals. lcs_worker EXECUTE-only on fn_mark_mid_ready. No RAISE-after-DML. 14 enforcement tests across 3 categories.
